sections.title: 🔴 `admins/stats` — Per-class attendance N+1
🔴 Unmemoized sort on every render
sections.content:
`src/components/AttendanceForm.tsx:221` — recreates sorted array on every render:

```tsx
{[...students].sort((a, b) => sortMode === 'abjad' 
  ? a.nama.localeCompare(b.nama, 'id') 
  : (parseInt(a.nis)||0)-(parseInt(b.nis)||0)).map((s) => { ... }
```

Same pattern in `TeacherAttendanceForm.tsx:170,184`. With ~40 students × 2 views (desktop+mobile) × each keystroke = ~80 sort runs per keystroke.

**Fix**: memoize the sorted list:

```tsx
const sortedStudents = useMemo(() => 
  [...students].sort((a, b) => sortMode === 'abjad'
    ? a.nama.localeCompare(b.nama, 'id')
    : (parseInt(a.nis)||0) - (parseInt(b.nis)||0)),
  [students, sortMode]
);
```

Then `sortedStudents.map(...)` in both desktop and mobile views.

sections.title: 🔴 Status button arrays recreated per render
sections.content:
`AttendanceForm.tsx:113-121` — `btnRow()` function creates 5 button config objects on every render for every student row:

```tsx
const btns = [
  { label: 'Hadir', val: 'HADIR', a: '...', b: '...' },
  // 4 more ...
];
```

**Fix**: hoist to module-level constant:

```tsx
const STATUS_BUTTONS = [
  { label: 'Hadir', val: 'HADIR' as const, active: '...', base: '...' },
  { label: 'Izin', val: 'IZIN' as const, active: '...', base: '...' },
  { label: 'Sakit', val: 'SAKIT' as const, active: '...', base: '...' },
  { label: 'PKL', val: 'PKL' as const, active: '...', base: '...' },
  { label: 'Alpa', val: 'ALPA' as const, active: '...', base: '...' },
];
```

sections.title: 🔴 Management page: 50+ useState calls trigger full re-render
sections.content:
`src/app/management/page.tsx` has ~50 `useState` calls plus `useEffect` that fetches all data on tab switch. Every setState re-renders the entire huge component.

**Fix**: split into smaller components per tab (KelasTab, GuruTab, SiswaTab) so state changes in one don't re-render the others.

sections.title: 🟡 `fetchData()` serial waterfall on dashboard
🔴 Login rate-limiting Map is unbounded
🟡 All API routes use `force-dynamic`
sections.content:
Every admin/teacher API route has `export const dynamic = 'force-dynamic'`. Combined with N+1 queries this means every page load hits the DB multiple times.

**Low-effort wins**:
- `/api/admin/classes` — data changes only on admin action. Add `stale-while-revalidate` header (30s stale, 60s revalidate).
- `/api/admin/stats` — recompute-heavy. Cache for 60s in a `Map<string, {data, ts}>` with TTL check. Data is stale by at most 1 minute.
- Completed attendance records (past dates) are immutable after submission day — add a CDN-cache-friendly header.

sections.title: 🟡 `FileReader` in upload handlers has no abort on unmount
sections.content:
`TeacherAttendanceForm.tsx:45` and `AttendanceForm.tsx:65`:

```tsx
const reader = new FileReader();
reader.onloadend = async () => { ... };  // ← fires even if component unmounted
reader.readAsDataURL(file);
```

If the user navigates away mid-upload, `reader.onloadend` sets state on unmounted component (React warns, but also the upload completes for nothing).

**Fix**: use `useRef` to track mounted state or use a fetch-based upload instead.

sections.title: 🟡 Profile: inline script injected on every mount
🔴 Server-side sort after Prisma `orderBy`
🟡 `parseInt(a.nis)` recomputed on every `sort` comparison
sections.content:
`src/app/api/admin/attendance/route.ts:32-33` — the `parseInt` runs on each comparison in the sort (O(n log n) recomputation):

```typescript
students.sort((a, b) => {
  const nisA = parseInt(a.nis) || 0;  // ← recomputed each comparison
  const nisB = parseInt(b.nis) || 0;  // ← recomputed each comparison
```

**Fix**: compute once per item:

```typescript
students
  .map(s => ({ ...s, nisNum: parseInt(s.nis) || 0 }))
  .sort((a, b) => a.nisNum !== b.nisNum 
    ? a.nisNum - b.nisNum 
    : a.nama.localeCompare(b.nama, 'id'));
```

Or better: store NIS as integer in the DB schema.

sections.title: Priority Summary
sections.content:
| Severity | Issue | File | Effort |
|----------|-------|------|--------|
| 🔴 | Per-class N+1 in stats | `admin/stats/route.ts` | 15 min |
| 🔴 | Unmemoized sort in render ×2 | `AttendanceForm.tsx`, `TeacherAttendanceForm.tsx` | 5 min |
| 🔴 | 50-state monolith component | `management/page.tsx` | 30 min (split) |
| 🔴 | Unbounded login-attempts Map | `auth/login/route.ts` | 5 min |
| 🟡 | Serial fetch waterfall | `page.tsx` (dashboard) | 2 min |
| 🟡 | Server-side double sort | `admin/attendance/route.ts` + 2 others | 5 min |
| 🟡 | Redundant parseInt in sort | `admin/attendance/route.ts` + multiple | 3 min |
| 🟡 | Inline script accumulation | `lib/theme.tsx` | 10 min |
| 🟢 | Reusable button array as constant | `AttendanceForm.tsx`, `TeacherAttendanceForm.tsx` | 5 min |
| 🟢 | stats cache with TTL | `admin/stats/route.ts` | 15 min |
